variants.name: 验尸官
variants.ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一名玩家：如果他死亡，你会得知离他最近的存活的邪恶角色。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Coroner & show them any player
variants.otherNightReminder: If the player known by the Coroner is dead, wake them and show them an evil character token.
variants.flavor: 请见谅，我必须进行尸检，而你还活着就无法操作。
